mapper.select: select count(*) from workplace where wp_usage = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, p.* FROM ( SELECT wp.wp_id as wpId, wp.wp_name as wpName, wp.wp_type as wpTypeNo, wt.wp_type_name as wpType, wp.wp_img as wpImg, wt.wp_type_sg as wpTypeSg, wt.wp_type_content as wpTypeContent FROM workplace wp LEFT OUTER JOIN wp_type wt ON wp.wp_type = wt.wp_type_no WHERE wp_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY wp_type_no, wp_id ) p ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
